title: AntyKostka
description: A professional-grade Fabric mod for saving, managing, and restoring your inventory layout with precision. 🚀
body:
# 📦 Anty-Kostka

Advanced Inventory Layout Management for Minecraft
A professional-grade Fabric mod for saving, managing, and restoring your inventory layout with precision. 🚀

--- ## 📌 About **Anty-Kostka** is an intelligent inventory management tool designed for players who value organization and speed. It allows you to "lock in" your preferred inventory layout and restore it instantly with a single shortcut. Whether you're preparing for a boss fight, organizing your building materials, or just keeping your hotbar clean, Anty-Kostka ensures your items are always exactly where they belong. --- ## ✨ Features ### 💾 Inventory Management - **Full Layout Save** - Save your entire inventory configuration (Hotbar, Main Inventory, and Off-hand) with one click. - **Single Slot Save** - Hover over a specific slot in any GUI to save only that individual item position. - **Smart Restoration** - Automatically moves items from your inventory to their saved positions using optimized click sequences. ### ⚙️ Functionality - **Cross-Version Support** - Seamlessly works across Minecraft versions from 1.21.1 up to 1.21.10. - **Intuitive Controls** - Minimalist design that stays out of your way until you need it. - **Visual Feedback** - Real-time chat notifications confirming your saves and restoration status. --- ## 🎮 Usage ### ⚡ Keybinds (Default) | Shortcut | Action | |----------|--------| | `CTRL + I` | **zapisuje uklad** | | `CTRL + O` | **przywraca zapisany uklad** | ### 🧩 Commands | Command | Action | |---------|--------| | `/bki help` | Show help menu and available shortcuts | | `/bki save` | Quick hint on how to save your layout | --- ## 📥 Installation 1. Download the latest `.jar` for your Minecraft version. 2. Ensure you have [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) installed. 3. Place the mod into your `%appdata%/.minecraft/mods` folder. 4. Launch the game and use `Ctrl + I` to save your first layout! --- ## 🛠️ Requirements - **Fabric API** - **Java 21** or higher - **Minecraft 1.21.x** --- ## 🤝 Links - **Discord**: [dc.bkubiak.dev](https://dc.bkubiak.dev) - **Developer**: [@xqbkubiak](https://github.com/xqbkubiak) --- ## 📜 License MIT License © 2026 bkubiakdev

The ultimate companion for your Minecraft inventory.
